pr.title: Fighter.c cleanup commit 4 + merge with masterhand
pr.author: snuffysasa

summary: Large fighter cleanup/merge PR centered on src/melee/ft/fighter.c, with broad symbol-propagation across asm and headers. The most visible changes rename lbl_804D4A08 to g_debugLevel, rename func_80022C30 to func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 across many asm/C call sites, clean several Fighter callback names, and refactor Fighter_procUpdate variable naming and condition style without evidence of intentional behavior changes. The PR had no review comments in the slice.
what_changed: Replaced the local fighter.c TODO/macro alias for lbl_804D4A08 with an extern s32 g_debugLevel declaration, and propagated g_debugLevel through asm/melee/db/code_80225374.s and src/melee/gm/gmmain.c.

Renamed func_80022C30 to func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 in include/functions.h, lbvector headers/source, fighter.c, ftlib.c, and many asm call sites across camera, effects, fighter character files, items, ground, menus, and sysdolphin baselib.

Renamed fighter.c functions from generic func_* names to Fighter-prefixed names: func_8006A360 became Fighter_8006A360, func_8006ABA0 became Fighter_8006ABA0, func_8006ABEC became Fighter_UnkIncrementCounters_8006ABEC, and func_8006AD10 became Fighter_Spaghetti_8006AD10.
Updated fighter.h prototypes to match the renamed fighter functions and corrected their HSD_GObj* argument types where the old prototypes had empty parameter lists.
Renamed ftCommonData field x8 to x8_someStickThreshold and updated fighter.c stick threshold comparisons and func_8000D148 call sites accordingly.
Simplified several boolean expressions, e.g. replacing explicit != 0 comparisons with direct truthiness checks in fighter.c callback and helper-call branches.
Renamed Fighter callback fields x2194_callback_x2194 to x2194_callback and x21CC_callback_x21cc to x21CC_callback in fighter.h and corresponding fighter.c uses.

Refactored Fighter_procUpdate local names from pPlayerEntityStruct/pCharData style to fighterObj/fighter, changed ground/air comparisons to GA_Air and GA_Ground constants, and retained comments documenting knockback, shield knockback, wind offset, stage bounds, and the invisible ceiling glitch note.

Changed Fighter_procUpdate calls from func_80022C30 to func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 for knockback angle and shield knockback angle calculations, and changed func_8007B924 to func_getWindOffsetVec_8007B924 where used in the excerpt.

Merged Master Hand-related changes according to the title and changed_files list, with src/melee/ft/chara/ftMasterHand/ftMasterHand_2.c touched, but the provided excerpt gives limited detail on those exact changes.
smart_moves: Renaming g_debugLevel globally instead of keeping a local fighter.c macro alias removed a TODO and made the debug-level symbol searchable across C and asm.

Propagating func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 through both C headers and asm call annotations kept mixed C/asm symbol references consistent, which is important in a decomp tree where asm still calls C symbols.

Using a cautious name like func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 preserves uncertainty while still improving on a raw address-based func_ name; the comments identify it as atan2 without overcommitting the final API name.
Fighter-prefixed function names made fighter.c's scheduler registrations clearer, especially the func_8038FD54 setup for Fighter_8006A360, Fighter_8006ABA0, and Fighter_Spaghetti_8006AD10.
The x8_someStickThreshold field rename is a useful incremental struct cleanup: it documents observed usage without requiring a full ftCommonData reverse-engineering pass.
The Fighter_procUpdate cleanup kept known gameplay bug commentary, including the invisible ceiling glitch note, while making local variable names and GA constants easier to read.
decomp_lessons: When promoting a guessed global from lbl_* to a semantic name, update asm labels, C externs, and all users in the same PR to avoid split terminology.
For heavily reused math helpers, a partial semantic name plus address suffix can be a safe intermediate convention when the exact SDK/lib name is unknown.
Headers should be updated alongside C cleanups: function prototype argument types and struct callback field names are part of the decomp knowledge, not just cosmetic cleanup.
Use enum/constant names like GA_Air and GA_Ground instead of raw numeric ground/air values when the domain is known; it improves readability without altering matching logic.
Field names based on repeated use sites, such as x8_someStickThreshold, are valuable even if tentative because they make future fighter input logic searches easier.
For large cleanup PRs, broad asm-only symbol replacement is acceptable when it is purely label/comment-level and keeps branch targets/opcodes unchanged in the diff.
naming_conventions: Raw data label lbl_804D4A08 was promoted to global-style g_debugLevel.
Unidentified but partially understood functions retained address suffixes, e.g. func_someCalcAngle_80022C30.
Fighter-local functions gained a Fighter_ prefix, e.g. Fighter_8006A360 and Fighter_8006ABA0.
Uncertain function names used explicit uncertainty markers such as Fighter_UnkIncrementCounters_8006ABEC and Fighter_Spaghetti_8006AD10.
Callback fields dropped duplicated offset placeholders where no meaning was known: x2194_callback_x2194 to x2194_callback and x21CC_callback_x21cc to x21CC_callback.
Struct field cleanup kept the original offset plus semantic hint: x8 became x8_someStickThreshold.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Performed symbol-only asm annotation replacements for func_80022C30 to func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 across many .s files, preserving instruction bytes and branch displacements.
Renamed the .sdata global in asm/melee/db/code_80225374.s from lbl_804D4A08 to g_debugLevel and updated sda21 loads/stores in asm references.
Moved temporary declarations in Fighter_Spaghetti_8006AD10 outside an inner block in the shown excerpt, likely to preserve matching while cleaning function structure.
Simplified boolean checks in C without evidence of changed behavior, a common cleanup tactic when compiler output remains stable.
Kept address suffixes on uncertain symbols so future matching work can still correlate names with DOL addresses.
follow_up_queries: Check later PRs for whether func_someCalcAngle_80022C30 was renamed to atan2 or another final math helper name.
Search for remaining lbl_804D4A08 references after PR 361 to verify g_debugLevel propagation was complete.
Inspect subsequent fighter.h cleanup for final names of x2194_callback and x21CC_callback.
Search later ftCommonData work for x8_someStickThreshold to see whether the stick threshold field received a stronger semantic name.
Review later Master Hand PRs for the exact merge effects in ftMasterHand_2.c, since this slice only shows that the file changed.
